message:
feat(bench): add SIMD scan benchmark for pattern matching hot path

Add Criterion benchmark targeting the SIMD-accelerated scan path used
in the pattern matching engine. Registers the new `simd_scan` bench
target in Cargo.toml with `harness = false` for Criterion compatibility.

The benchmark measures throughput of byte-level scanning operations
that form the inner loop of the pattern detection pipeline, providing
a regression baseline for future optimization work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -188,6 +188,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "bocpd"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "simd_scan"
+harness = false
+
 [[bench]]
 name = "causal_dag"
 harness = false
